title: What’s Coming to Disney+ in March 2026
content:
ByArushi Jacob

Disney+is stepping into March with a packed lineup of premieres, returning favorites and major live sports.March kicks off with the premiere of “Vet Detective” and “The Secret Agent.” Later on, ESPN broadcasts events begin, including the Men and Women’s college basketball championship games, along with the PGA tour. On the entertainment side, new and returning titles arrive across Disney+ and Hulu, with highlights like “The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives” returning for Season 4, brand new episodes of “American Idol,” and the Academy Award-nominated film “Sentimental Value” airing on Hulu.“The Bachelorette” and “Celebrity Jeopardy” round out the month, alongside the 98th Academy Awards broadcast ceremony and the “Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special.”Takea look at Disney+’s full March slate below, and sign up for aDisney+ account here.

March 1“How Not to Draw: Shorts” (Premiere)“It Was Just and Accident” (Hulu)“Vet Detective” (Disney+ and Hulu)“The Secret Agent” (Hulu)

March 2“In Your Radiant Season” (Disney+ and Hulu)

March 3“American Idol” (Season 9) (ABC, Disney+ and Hulu)“Beddy Byes” (Premiere)

March 4“Battle of Fates” (Hulu Original)“RJ Decker” (Hulu and ABC)

March 6“Friends Like These: The Murder of Skylar Neese” (Hulu Original) (Premiere)

March 7“Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts”

March 8“Ghost Elephants” (Disney+ and Hulu) (Premiere)“Women’s College Basketball: ACC Championship” (ESPN)“Women’s College Basketball: SEC Championship” (ESPN)“Women’s College Basketball: Big 12 Championship” (ESPN)

March 9“In Your Radiant Season” (Hulu Original) (Disney+ and Hulu)

March 10“American Idol” (Season 9) (ABC, Disney+ and Hulu)

March 11“Sunny Nights” (Season 1) (Premiere) (Hulu)

March 12“The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives” (Season 4) (Hulu Original) (Premiere)“PGA TOUR: THE PLAYERS Championship Round 1” (ESPN+)March 13“Malpractice” (Hulu)

March 14“Celebrity Jeopardy!” (Season 4) (Hulu) (Premiere)“Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts”“PGA TOUR: The PLAYERS Championship Round 3” (ESPN+)“NWSL Opening Day: Boston Legacy vs. Gotham FC “(ABC and Disney+)“Men’s College Basketball: Big12 Championship” (ESPN)“Men’s College Basketball: ACC Championship” (ESPN)“Women’s College Basketball: American Championship” (ESPNU)

March 15“The 98th Oscars”(ABC and Hulu)“The Bachelorette: Before the First Rose” (ABC and Hulu)“Rooster Fighter” (Hulu)“PGA TOUR: The PLAYERS Championship Final Round” (ESPN+)“Men’s College Basketball: SEC Championship” (ESPN)“Women’s College Basketball: Selection Show” (ESPN)

March 16“In Your Radiant Season” (Hulu Original)

March 17“Agatha Christie Library” (ITV)“American Idol” (Season 9) (ABC, Disney+ and Hulu)“TGL Semifinals: Doubleheader” (ESPN)

March 18“The Nanny” (Sony)“Short Circuit Experimental Films: Life Drawings” (Premiere)“Short Circuit Experimental Films: Maddie & The Test” (Premiere)“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament First Four”(ESPN Networks)

March 19“NCAA College Wrestling Championships: First Round”(ESPNU)“NCAA College Wrestling Championships: Second Round” (ESPN)

March 20“NCAA College Wrestling Championships: Quarterfinals” (ESPNU)“NCAA College Wrestling Championships: Semifinals”(ESPN2)“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament First Round” (ESPN Networks)

March 21“Garfield” (2024)“Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts”NCAA College Wrestling Championships: Medal Round (ESPNU)NCAA College Wrestling Championships: Finals (ESPN)Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament First Round (ESPN Networks)March 22“Summertide”“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament Second Round”(ESPN Networks)

March 23“The Bachelorette”(Season 22) (ABC and Hulu) (Premiere)“In Your Radiant Season” (Disney+ and Hulu)“Sentimental Value” (2025) (Hulu)“TGL Championship: Match 1” (ESPN2)“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament Second Round” (ESPN Networks)March 24“American Idol” (Season 9) (ABC, Disney+ and Hulu)“Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special” (Disney+ Original) (Premiere)“Magicampers” (Premiere)“TGL Championship: Match 2” (ESPN)“TGL Championship: Match 3” (If necessary) (ESPN2)

March 27“Chibi Tiny Tales: Shorts” (Season 6)“Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice”(Hulu Original) (Premiere)“Versa: Short Film” (Premiere)“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament Sweet 16” (ESPN Networks)

March 28“Dangerous Animals” (2025) (Hulu)“Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts”“UFL: Defenders vs. Battlehawks” (ESPN)“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament Sweet 16” (ESPN Networks)March 29“UFL: Aviators vs. Storm” (ESPN)“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament Elite Eight” (ESPN Networks)

March 30“American Idol” (Season 9) (ABC, Disney+ and Hulu)“In Your Radiant Season” (Disney+ and Hulu)“Super Animals” (Season 3) (Disney+ and Hulu)“Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!!” (Season 1B) (Disney XD)“Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament Elite Eight” (ESPN Networks)

March 31“If It’s Tuesday… It’s Murder”(Hulu) (Premiere)
content_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

Disney+將於三月推出一系列精彩的首映、回歸熱門節目及重大現場體育賽事。三月的開端將迎來《獸醫偵探》(Vet Detective)和《秘密特工》(The Secret Agent)的首映。隨後，ESPN將開始直播各項賽事，包括男子和女子大學籃球錦標賽，以及PGA巡迴賽。在娛樂方面，Disney+和Hulu將推出新作及回歸的標題，亮點包括《摩門妻子的秘密生活》(The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives)第4季回歸、《美國偶像》(American Idol)的新集數，以及奧斯卡提名電影《情感價值》(Sentimental Value)在Hulu播出。《單身女郎》(The Bachelorette)和《名人危機四伏》(Celebrity Jeopardy)將為本月畫下句點，還有第98屆奧斯卡頒獎典禮的直播和《漢娜·蒙塔娜20週年特別節目》(Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special)。以下是Disney+三月的完整排程，您可以在這裡註冊Disney+帳戶。

三月1日  
《如何不畫畫：短片》(How Not to Draw: Shorts)（首映）  
《這只是個意外》(It Was Just an Accident)（Hulu）  
《獸醫偵探》(Vet Detective)（Disney+和Hulu）  
《秘密特工》(The Secret Agent)（Hulu）  

三月2日  
《在你光輝的季節》(In Your Radiant Season)（Disney+和Hulu）  

三月3日  
《美國偶像》(American Idol)第9季（ABC、Disney+和Hulu）  
《睡覺時間》(Beddy Byes)（首映）  

三月4日  
《命運之戰》(Battle of Fates)（Hulu原創）  
《RJ·德克》(RJ Decker)（Hulu和ABC）  

三月6日  
《朋友如這樣：斯凱拉·尼斯的謀殺案》(Friends Like These: The Murder of Skylar Neese)（Hulu原創）（首映）  

三月7日  
《儲物櫃日記：殭屍：短片》(Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts)  

三月8日  
《鬼象》(Ghost Elephants)（Disney+和Hulu）（首映）  
《女子大學籃球：ACC錦標賽》(Women’s College Basketball: ACC Championship)（ESPN）  
《女子大學籃球：SEC錦標賽》(Women’s College Basketball: SEC Championship)（ESPN）  
《女子大學籃球：大12錦標賽》(Women’s College Basketball: Big 12 Championship)（ESPN）  

三月9日  
《在你光輝的季節》(In Your Radiant Season)（Hulu原創）（Disney+和Hulu）  

三月10日  
《美國偶像》(American Idol)第9季（ABC、Disney+和Hulu）  

三月11日  
《陽光之夜》(Sunny Nights)第1季（首映）（Hulu）  

三月12日  
《摩門妻子的秘密生活》(The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives)第4季（Hulu原創）（首映）  
《PGA巡迴賽：球員錦標賽第一輪》(PGA TOUR: THE PLAYERS Championship Round 1)（ESPN+）  

三月13日  
《醫療失職》(Malpractice)（Hulu）  

三月14日  
《名人危機四伏》(Celebrity Jeopardy!)第4季（Hulu）（首映）  
《儲物櫃日記：殭屍：短片》(Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts)  
《PGA巡迴賽：球員錦標賽第三輪》(PGA TOUR: The PLAYERS Championship Round 3)（ESPN+）  
《NWSL開幕日：波士頓傳奇對高譚FC》(NWSL Opening Day: Boston Legacy vs. Gotham FC)（ABC和Disney+）  
《男子大學籃球：大12錦標賽》(Men’s College Basketball: Big12 Championship)（ESPN）  
《男子大學籃球：ACC錦標賽》(Men’s College Basketball: ACC Championship)（ESPN）  
《女子大學籃球：美國錦標賽》(Women’s College Basketball: American Championship)（ESPNU）  

三月15日  
《第98屆奧斯卡》(The 98th Oscars)（ABC和Hulu）  
《單身女郎：第一朵玫瑰之前》(The Bachelorette: Before the First Rose)（ABC和Hulu）  
《鬥雞者》(Rooster Fighter)（Hulu）  
《PGA巡迴賽：球員錦標賽決賽輪》(PGA TOUR: The PLAYERS Championship Final Round)（ESPN+）  
《男子大學籃球：SEC錦標賽》(Men’s College Basketball: SEC Championship)（ESPN）  
《女子大學籃球：選拔秀》(Women’s College Basketball: Selection Show)（ESPN）  

三月16日  
《在你光輝的季節》(In Your Radiant Season)（Hulu原創）  

三月17日  
《阿嘉莎·克里斯蒂圖書館》(Agatha Christie Library)（ITV）  
《美國偶像》(American Idol)第9季（ABC、Disney+和Hulu）  
《TGL半決賽：雙場比賽》(TGL Semifinals: Doubleheader)（ESPN）  

三月18日  
《保姆》(The Nanny)（Sony）  
《短路實驗電影：生活素描》(Short Circuit Experimental Films: Life Drawings)（首映）  
《短路實驗電影：瑪迪與測試》(Short Circuit Experimental Films: Maddie & The Test)（首映）  
《女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽前四場》(Women’s College Basketball: NCAA Tournament First Four)（ESPN Networks）

3月19日 “NCAA大學摔跤錦標賽：第一輪” (ESPNU) “NCAA大學摔跤錦標賽：第二輪” (ESPN)

3月20日 “NCAA大學摔跤錦標賽：四分之一決賽” (ESPNU) “NCAA大學摔跤錦標賽：半決賽” (ESPN2) “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽第一輪” (ESPN Networks)

3月21日 “加菲貓(Garfield)” (2024) “Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts” “NCAA大學摔跤錦標賽：獎牌輪” (ESPNU) “NCAA大學摔跤錦標賽：決賽” (ESPN) “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽第一輪” (ESPN Networks) 3月22日 “夏潮(Summertide)” “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽第二輪” (ESPN Networks)

3月23日 “單身女郎(The Bachelorette)” (第22季) (ABC和Hulu) (首播) “在你光輝的季節(In Your Radiant Season)” (Disney+和Hulu) “情感價值(Sentimental Value)” (2025) (Hulu) “TGL錦標賽：比賽1” (ESPN2) “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽第二輪” (ESPN Networks) 3月24日 “美國偶像(American Idol)” (第9季) (ABC、Disney+和Hulu) “漢娜·蒙塔娜20週年特別節目(Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special)” (Disney+ 原創) (首播) “魔法營(Magicampers)” (首播) “TGL錦標賽：比賽2” (ESPN) “TGL錦標賽：比賽3” (如有必要) (ESPN2)

3月27日 “小小故事(Chibi Tiny Tales): Shorts” (第6季) “邁克與尼克與尼克與愛麗絲(Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice)” (Hulu 原創) (首播) “Versa: 短片” (首播) “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽16強” (ESPN Networks)

3月28日 “危險動物(Dangerous Animals)” (2025) (Hulu) “Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES: Shorts” “UFL：防守者對戰戰鷹(UFL: Defenders vs. Battlehawks)” (ESPN) “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽16強” (ESPN Networks) 3月29日 “UFL：飛行員對戰風暴(UFL: Aviators vs. Storm)” (ESPN) “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽八強” (ESPN Networks)

3月30日 “美國偶像(American Idol)” (第9季) (ABC、Disney+和Hulu) “在你光輝的季節(In Your Radiant Season)” (Disney+和Hulu) “超級動物(Super Animals)” (第3季) (Disney+和Hulu) “遊戲王！GO RUSH！！(Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!!）” (第1B季) (Disney XD) “女子大學籃球：NCAA錦標賽八強” (ESPN Networks)

3月31日 “如果是星期二……就是謀殺(If It’s Tuesday… It’s Murder)” (Hulu) (首播)
summary_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

Disney+將於三月推出一系列精彩的首映、回歸熱門節目及重大現場體育賽事。三月的開端將迎來《獸醫偵探》(Vet Detective)和《秘密特工》(The Secret Agent)的首映。隨後，ESPN將開始直播各項賽事，包括男子和女子大學籃球錦標賽，以及PGA巡迴賽。
